# FP Memory — Cross-Project Facts

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by fp-self-evolve. Max ~2200 chars. Facts only, no instructions. -->

## Environment
- OS: Windows 11
- Agent: pi (coding-agent) via akilecloud proxy (OpenAI-compatible)
- Shell: bash (Git Bash), PowerShell for Windows-specific ops
- Package manager: npm global

## Project Conventions
<!-- Add per-project conventions below -->

## Tool Quirks
- pi on Windows: `powershell.exe` for PowerShell scripts, not `pwsh`
- akilecloud: model IDs in API are full names (e.g., `gpt-5.6-sol` not `gpt-sol`)
- pi models.json: use `!` prefix for shell commands in apiKey, `$ENV_VAR` for environment

## Pitfalls
- akilecloud 404 "model not found" → the model ID is wrong; query `/v1/models` first
- pi 401 on third-party proxy → baseUrl must point to proxy, not api.openai.com
- powershell.exe scripts need `-NoProfile` to skip profile loading
